entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: testRuleTerminateTaskResult Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE TaskResult PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <TaskResult created="1765473130526" id="c0a800049b0e1e72819b0e66181e00d4" launched="1765473128912" launcher="spadmin" modified="1765473131406" name="Update Identity Aaron Allen AccessRequest - 14" significantModified="1765473131406" targetClass="Identity" targetId="Aaron Allen" targetName="Aaron Allen" type="LCM"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="identityRequestId" value="0000000994"/> <entry key="workflowCaseId" value="Update Identity Aaron Allen AccessRequest - 14"/> <entry key="workflowProcessId"/> <entry key="workflowSummary"> <value> <WorkflowSummary step="Approve and Provision"> <Interactions> <ApprovalSummary owner="Alice.Ford" request="Owner Approval - Account Changes for User: Aaron Allen" startDate="1765473131325" workItemId="0000001509" workItemType="Approval"> <ApprovalSet> <ApprovalItem application="WebServicesApplicationEshiam" assignmentId="a6d29892037147a8bfd76c5b9d465f42" displayValue="WS_GROUP_110" id="9ca5a89191b042b89ac6bfd80231920f" name="groups" nativeIdentity="EMP00357" operation="Add" owner="spadmin" value="WS_GROUP_110"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="attachmentConfigList"/> <entry key="attachments"/> <entry key="flow" value="AccessRequest"/> <entry key="id" value="c0a81d8998df1f3e8198e4ceb7c503f1"/> <entry key="interface" value="LCM"/> <entry key="operation" value="Add"/> <entry key="requester" value="spadmin"/> </Map> </Attributes> </ApprovalItem> </ApprovalSet> </ApprovalSummary> </Interactions> </WorkflowSummary> </value> </entry> </Map> </Attributes> <Definition> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.TaskDefinition" id="Workflow Launcher" name="Workflow Launcher"/> </Definition> <Messages> <Message key="notification_failed_no_email" type="Warn"> <Parameters> <String>Alice.Ford</String> </Parameters> </Message> </Messages> <Owner> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.Identity" id="spadmin" name="spadmin"/> </Owner> </TaskResult>
